prompt: How many course sections are taught in each building?

inputData.question: How many course sections are taught in each building?

I need to join course_sections with classrooms on classroom_id, then group by building and count the sections. The course_sections table has a classroom_id foreign key that links to classrooms, which has a building column. I'll count the course sections per building and order by building name for clarity.","sql":"SELECT 
  c.building,
  COUNT(cs.id) AS section_count
FROM course_sections cs
JOIN classrooms c ON cs.classroom_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.building

visualization.title: Course Sections by Building
visualization.description: Number of course sections taught in each building

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  c.building,
  COUNT(cs.id) AS section_count
FROM course_sections cs
JOIN classrooms c ON cs.classroom_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.building
ORDER BY c.building;

visualization.title: Course Sections by Building
visualization.description: Number of course sections taught in each building

result.sql:
SELECT 
  c.building,
  COUNT(cs.id) AS section_count
FROM course_sections cs
JOIN classrooms c ON cs.classroom_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.building
ORDER BY c.building;
